prompt:
You are a PROOF-FILLER. Replace the `sorry` placeholders for the listed declarations with complete, type-correct Lean proofs. Do NOT change statement signatures; do NOT weaken hypotheses.

Lean files live under: /<repo-root>/CausalSmith/CausalSmith/Substrate/ProductLossMonotoneCoupling
Target declarations: CausalSmith.Substrate.ProductLossMonotoneCoupling.hoeffding_cov_identity, CausalSmith.Substrate.ProductLossMonotoneCoupling.integrable_frechet_gap

## Instructions
File: CausalSmith/Substrate/ProductLossMonotoneCoupling/Hoeffding.lean. Fill the 2 sorries — the analytic core. DO NOT change statements. Keep building; private helper lemmas encouraged.

Goal `hoeffding_cov_identity`: for a coupling `π` of L² measures, `(∫ p, p.1*p.2 ∂π) - (∫ x,x ∂μ)*(∫ y,y ∂ν) = ∫ x, ∫ y, (jointCdf π x y - cdf μ x * cdf ν y) ∂volume ∂volume`. Standard proof (Hoeffding 1940 / Lehmann 1966 / Nelsen Copulas §2): pointwise tail identity `a*b = ∫∫ ((1{s<a}-1{s<0})*(1{t<b}-1{t<0})) ds dt` for reals a,b; substitute, then Tonelli/Fubini (`MeasureTheory.integral_prod`, `lintegral_prod`, `Measure.integral_integral_swap`) to exchange the `π`-integral over (a,b) with the Lebesgue `(s,t)`-integral. Under the swap, `∫ (1{s<X}-1{s<0})(1{t<Y}-1{t<0}) dπ` collapses to `P(X>s,Y>t) - P(X>s)P(Y>t)` type terms = `jointCdf π s t - cdf μ s * cdf ν t` after re-expressing survival/quadrant probabilities via the joint cdf and marginals. `MemLp 2` hypotheses give integrability enabling every Fubini step. Search Mathlib for the tail/layer-cake helper: `lintegral_eq_lintegral_meas_lt`, `MeasureTheory.lintegral_comp_...`, `integral_indicator`, and covariance material (`ProbabilityTheory.covariance`, `MeasureTheory.integral_mul_...`). This is hard: if the full identity resists, first prove `integrable_frechet_gap` and a scalar tail lemma as standalone `private` lemmas, then assemble. Reuse `frechet_hoeffding_upper/lower` for bounding |gap| in the integrability proof: `|jointCdf π x y - cdf μ x*cdf ν y| ≤ min(F,G) - max(F+G-1,0)` which is integrable over ℝ² by the L² moment bound. Verify with `lean_diagnostic_messages`; keep the file under a sensible size, factor helpers.

Use the lean-lsp MCP tools to check your proof (diagnostics/goal). When done, output a SHORT plain-text report: which decls you closed, which remain, and any blocker. No JSON required.
